# Task: Fix collate: broken task links + missing task INDEX.md generation (#53)

> Task ID: FORGE-S11-T04
> Sprint: [FORGE-S11](../INDEX.md)
> Status: ✅ committed
> Estimate: M

## Description

Sprint INDEX.md renders task links as {taskId}/INDEX.md (flat) but actual path is tasks/{task_dir}/INDEX.md. Also no INDEX.md is generated inside task directories. Fix collate.cjs path construction and add INDEX.md generation for task directories.
